heading: Consolidated research database
label: 6502 Consolidated research database
notes: Amendments2021—Subsec. (a). inserted subsec. (a) heading and added pars. (1) and (2) and heading, introductory provisions, and subpars. (A) and (B) of par. (3), and struck out former subsec. (a) heading, former par. (1), which related to publication of research abstract database in general, and former par. (2) heading and subpars. (A) and (B), which related to contents of database. Subpars. (C) to (G) of former par. (2) effectively redesignated subpars. (C) to (G) of par. (3).Pub. L. 117–58

children.label: A
children.text: proposed funding for any new projects; and

children.label: B
children.text: proposed additional funding for any existing projects.

children.heading: .—Publication
children.label: 2 .—Publication
children.text: Not less frequently than annually, after receiving the descriptions under paragraph (1), the Assistant Secretary shall publish on a public website a comprehensive database including a description of all research projects conducted by the Department of Transportation, including research funded through university transportation centers under section 5505.

children.label: A
children.text: be delimited by research project; and

children.label: i
children.text: research objectives;

children.label: ii
children.text: the progress made with respect to the project, including whether the project is ongoing or complete;

children.label: iii
children.text: any outcomes of the project, including potential implications for policy, regulations, or guidance issued by a modal administration or the Department of Transportation;

children.label: iv
children.text: any findings of the project;

children.label: v
children.text: the amount of funds allocated for the project; and

children.label: vi
children.text: such other information as the Assistant Secretary determines to be necessary to address Departmental priorities and statutory mandates;

children.label: C
children.text: identify research projects with multimodal applications;

children.label: D
children.text: specify how relevant modal administrations have assisted, will contribute to, or plan to use the findings from the research projects identified under paragraph (1);

children.label: E
children.text: identify areas in which more than 1 modal administration is conducting research on a similar subject or a subject that has a bearing on more than 1 mode;

children.label: F
children.text: indicate how the findings of research are being disseminated to improve the efficiency, effectiveness, and safety of transportation systems; and

children.label: G
children.text: describe the public and stakeholder input to the research plans submitted under section 6501(a)(1).
the amount spent in the last full fiscal year on transportation research and development with specific descriptions of projects funded at $5,000,000 or more; and
the amount proposed in the current budget for transportation research and development with specific descriptions of projects funded at $5,000,000 or more.
a summary of the Federal transportation research and development activities for the previous fiscal year in each topic area;
the amount spent in each topic area;
a description of the extent to which the research and development is meeting the expectations described in section 6503(c)(1); and
any amendments to the strategic plan developed under section 6503.
